questions.subject: Environment
questions.prompt: With reference to the governance of biological resources in India, which of the following entities recently issued the Biological Diversity (Access and Benefit Sharing) Regulation 2025?

options.text: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change

questions.explanation: The new Biological Diversity (Access and Benefit Sharing) Regulation 2025 was issued by the National Biodiversity Authority (NBA), not directly by the Ministry or State Boards.
questions.takeaway: The National Biodiversity Authority (NBA) is the statutory body responsible for issuing regulations regarding Access and Benefit Sharing (ABS) in India.
questions.evidenceExcerpt: The National Biodiversity Authority (NBA) has issued the new Biological Diversity (Access and Benefit Sharing) Regulation 2025.
